overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a scenic overlook of a futuristic neon-lit city. The player stands on a high concrete ledge overlooking skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, then pans across the skyline before turning to walk along a trash-strewn roadside toward a parked red motorcycle.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated scenic overlook of futuristic city

agents.ego_description: standing on a high concrete overlook, slowly panning the view across the futuristic cityscape and holographic skyline

entered.detail: black coin-operated telescope mounted on the concrete ledge for viewing the city
tall glowing holographic billboards and neon signs towering above the city
dense cluster of glass and steel skyscrapers with futuristic architecture
futuristic hovering vehicle moving through the air between buildings
weathered concrete barrier with graffiti marking the edge of the overlook
large oval stadium building visible on the left side of the cityscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a high concrete overlook with a coin-operated binocular viewer visible on the right. The camera slowly pans left across a sprawling futuristic cityscape featuring towering holographic advertisements, glass skyscrapers, and flying vehicles. The bright midday sun illuminates the clear blue sky above the dense urban cluster.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop observation deck with scattered debris

events.description: camera turns right revealing a standing character and the immediate rooftop environment with trash piles
begins walking forward along the concrete overlook past the standing character

agents.ego_description: turning away from the city view to walk along the overlook edge, passing a standing character

notable_agents.action: standing on the overlook facing the city, wearing casual clothing with a red bag

entered.detail: character standing near the ledge looking out at the city view
tall palm tree growing near the overlook edge
scattered garbage bags, cardboard, and debris accumulated on the concrete surface
low concrete wall with colorful graffiti tags and stickers

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right away from the city view, revealing a standing NPC character near the ledge. The scene transitions to show the immediate overlook environment with scattered trash piles, a palm tree, and graffiti-covered concrete barriers. The character stands observing the city as the camera begins walking past them along the ledge.

events.description: city skyline fades from view as the camera moves along the roadside revealing desert rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the trash-strewn concrete sidewalk away from the city overlook

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rock outcroppings and desert terrain visible beyond the road
wooden telephone poles with crossbars and wires running along the roadside
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon beyond the desert
paved two-lane road running parallel to the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk littered with trash and debris, the futuristic city skyline disappears behind as the landscape opens to reveal desert rock formations and distant mountains. Utility poles line the asphalt road running parallel to the path, with sparse vegetation and clear blue skies dominating the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert roadside with parked vehicle and bus shelter

events.description: red motorcycle comes into view parked on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: approaching the parked red motorcycle on the roadside near a bus shelter

notable_agents.action: red sports motorcycle parked on the roadside shoulder

entered.detail: futuristic red sports bike with black wheels parked on the asphalt
metal and glass shelter structure with advertising displays on the side

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a red futuristic motorcycle parked on the asphalt roadside next to a bus shelter. The concrete sidewalk transitions to asphalt near the parked vehicle, with desert landscape and utility poles still visible in the background under the clear midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a panoramic view of a futuristic metropolis to a desolate roadside in a desert landscape. It begins on a high concrete overlook, panning left across a sprawling cityscape of glass skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and flying vehicles under a bright midday sun. As the camera turns right, the urban vista is replaced by the immediate surroundings of the ledge, passing a standing NPC and graffiti-covered barriers amidst scattered piles of trash. The scene then shifts as the camera walks along a debris-strewn sidewalk, leaving the city skyline behind to reveal open desert rock formations and distant mountains lined with utility poles. Finally, the path transitions from concrete to asphalt as the camera approaches a red futuristic motorcycle parked next to a bus shelter under the clear blue sky.
